title: Uppsala Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Uppsala with a Z-Score of -3.71. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Uppsala are extremely cold, with a significant impact on daily life. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a high number of heating degree days (HDD), with a value of 14.0 GG. 
 The low temperature and moderate humidity of 58% are contributing to the severity of the event.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure safety and minimize disruptions.
